arts.ttl: Journalist: Liverpool player could head to La Liga soon, clubs locked in talks
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Stefan Bajcetic could join Real Betis on loan this month. According to Fabrizio Romano, the two clubs are currently locked in advanced talks to get the deal across the line. The 20-year-old midfielder is currently on loan at Red Bull Salzburg, but he has not had ample opportunities with them. The midfielder has […] The post Journalist: Liverpool player could head to La Liga soon, clubs locked in talks appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.sum: Alan Shearer has delivered a scathing assessment of Manchester United's recent performances, likening their display against Newcastle to that of a 'youth team'.

arts.ttl: New Pogba REVEALED as Man Utd star labelled a ‘wrong ‘un’
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho is the Man Utd player in question, with Graeme Souness, who was notorious for his criticism of Paul Pogba during the France midfielder’s time at Man Utd, targeting the Argentina international because of his attitude. Souness was critical of the wages that Premier League clubs give to young players, suggesting that Garnacho is one of those who has got too much, too young.
